# Larvoice TTS API

Larvoice is a Text-to-Speech API for creating Vietnamese and English audio from text, with voice cloning, previews, async jobs, batch jobs, SRT output, usage tracking, and per-account voices.

Base URL: https://api.larvoice.com

Primary documentation:
- Human docs: https://api.larvoice.com/README.md
- LLM integration guide: https://api.larvoice.com/llms-full.md
- MCP guide: https://api.larvoice.com/MCP.md
- OpenAPI: https://api.larvoice.com/openapi.json
- Postman guide: https://api.larvoice.com/POSTMAN.md
- Playground: https://api.larvoice.com/playground
- Mini App: https://api.larvoice.com/app

MCP package:
- Command: npx -y @larvoice/mcp
- Login wizard: npx -y @larvoice/mcp login
- Auth env: LARVOICE_API_KEY=<your-api-key>
- Works with Cursor, Codex, Claude Desktop, Kiro, Antigravity, OpenClaw, Hermes, and other command-based MCP clients.

Authentication:
- Send user API key with header: x-api-key: <your-api-key>
- Get a free API key from Telegram bot: https://t.me/larvoice_api_bot

Recommended user flows:
- Check account: GET /v1/me
- Check languages: GET /v1/languages
- Upload a voice: POST /v1/voices
- Edit voice name/ref_text: PATCH /v1/voices/:id
- Preview TTS: POST /v1/tts/preview
- Preview voice: POST /v1/voices/:id/preview
- Create TTS job: POST /v1/tts
- Create many TTS jobs: POST /v1/tts/batch
- Poll job: GET /v1/tts/jobs/:job_id
- List jobs: GET /v1/tts/jobs
- Cancel queued job: POST /v1/tts/jobs/:job_id/cancel
- Check usage: GET /v1/usage

Important limits:
- TTS job text: up to 10000 characters per job by default.
- Preview text: up to 500 characters.
- Batch: up to 50 items.
- Voice upload file: up to 25 MB.
- Supported audio upload formats: mp3, wav, m4a.

Best practice:
- After uploading a voice, use voice_id instead of ref_audio_url.
- Poll async jobs until status is completed or failed.
- Use preview endpoints before creating long jobs.
- Use batch endpoint for video chapters, course lessons, IVR prompts, and multi-scene content.
